title: Tender Smoky Italian Tofu Ravioli
description: A smoky and springy Italian dish featuring tofu, cooked in a tagine and formed into ravioli, perfect for a midnight craving. This low-sodium-friendly recipe is a unique twist on traditional Italian cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic and onion until softened.
Add the smoked paprika, tomato paste, and vegetable broth to the skillet and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and let cook for 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the crumbled tofu and the smoky mixture from the skillet.
Lay a ravioli wrapper on a flat surface and place a tablespoon of the tofu mixture in the center of the wrapper.
Fold the wrapper over the filling to form a triangle and press the edges together to seal.
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
Place the ravioli on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the ravioli from the oven and top with grated parmesan cheese.
